2024-03-04T06:45:00.CONTENT_EN: Due to high wind , the following special traffic and transport arrangements have been implemented on Hong Kong-Zhuhai-Macao Bridge (HZMB) Main Bridge, with details as shown below: (i) The speed limit of the fast and middle lanes of HZMB Main Bridge are lowered from 100km/h to 50 km/h; and (ii) The speed limit of the slow lane of HZMB Main Bridge is lowered from 80km/h to 50 km/h.
